subject: A merfolk rogue stalking through submerged ruins, blade drawn, half-camouflaged against algae-covered stone columns
description: A lithe merfolk figure creeps through the shadowed interior of a sunken underwater ruin. Crumbled stone columns and arches rise around them, draped in mossy green-blue growth. The merfolk carries a slim blade and is rendered mostly in silhouette, blending into the murky teal water. Shafts of dim aqua light filter down from above, illuminating particulates in the water and giving the scene a hushed, predatory atmosphere. The composition is a cool monochrome of deep blue-green tones with darker silhouettes in the foreground and a slightly brighter blue haze in the background.
foreground: merfolk rogue in silhouette with blade, partially behind a broken stone column
background: submerged stone ruins with broken columns and arches, hazy filtered light from above
